basic_details.job_title: BPCL Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 55 Technical Officer, Site Manager and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Experienced Professionals (Multiple Verticals – see Vacancy Details)
basic_details.department: 1. Bharat Petro Resources Ltd (BPRL) 2. Company Secretary 3. Finance 4. Petrochemicals 5. Wayside Amenities
basic_details.total_vacancies: 55 (indicative; may vary as per Corporation's requirement)
basic_details.job_location: All India (Transferable; candidates may be posted at any BPCL location, JV or subsidiary)
basic_details.short_information: BPCL is recruiting Experienced Professionals across multiple posts and verticals with relevant post-qualification work experience, last date 20 June 2026.

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified after CBT result
important_dates.pre-employment medical examination: To be notified after Personal Interview

application_fee.general_fee: Rs. 1,180/- (Application fee Rs. 1,000/- + GST @ 18% i.e. Rs. 180/-) + payment gateway charges if applicable (Non-Refundable)
application_fee.payment_mode: Online only - Debit Card / Credit Card / UPI / Net Banking
application_fee.details: The application fee is applicable for all positions. Fee once paid will NOT be refunded under any circumstances. Chargeback cannot be claimed for any reason. Payment must be completed online; no other mode is accepted.

age_limit.age_relaxation: Maximum of 10 years cumulative relaxation (or absolute cap of 55 years, whichever applies to the post)
age_limit.details: Age limits vary by post and are reckoned as on 01-04-2026. Upper age limit indicated is for General (UR) and EWS candidates. Age relaxations are applicable as per Presidential Directives for reserved categories. The maximum age of the candidate should not exceed 55 years (for posts with absolute cap) or not exceed General age limit + 10 years (cumulative relaxation cap) as applicable to the respective post.

vacancy_details.Vertical / Department: Team Member / Team Leader – Asset Manager

vacancy_details.Details: B.E. / B.Tech in any discipline with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) OR Post-Graduate in Geo-sciences (Geology / Applied Geology / Geophysics / Applied Geophysics) with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
Minimum 10 years of post-qualification work experience with at least 5 years of cumulative experience in Exploration / Reservoir Management in Exploration & Projects Hydrocarbon sector.
B.E. / B.Tech in any discipline with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD). Post Graduate Degree in Engineering or MBA / PGDM or Post Graduate in Geo-Sciences is desirable.
Minimum 7 years’ work experience with at least 5 years of cumulative experience in production activities / Asset management in Exploration & Projects Hydrocarbon sector.
B.E. / B.Tech in Petroleum Engineering / Petroleum Technology / Applied Petroleum Engineering / Chemical Engineering with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
Minimum 7 years’ work experience in Upstream Oil & Gas Industry in Reservoir Engineering.
Qualified Company Secretary from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI). Additional qualification of LLB will be preferred.

Minimum 18 years of post-qualification experience, of which at least the last 5 years should be in an equity-listed Company in their Company Secretarial set-up with knowledge of Companies Act, SEBI regulations, FEMA Act, Listing Requirements, etc.
Qualified Company Secretary from the Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI). Additional qualification of LLB will be preferred.

Minimum 7 years of post-qualification experience, of which at least the last 2 years should be in an equity-listed Company in their Company Secretarial setup with knowledge of Companies Act, SEBI regulations, FEMA Act, Listing Requirements, etc.

CA (Final Examination cleared in First attempt) with minimum 55% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) OR ICWA (Final Examination cleared in First attempt) with minimum 55% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
Minimum 14 years of post-qualification experience in Finance / Accounts / Treasury Operations / Taxation / Auditing / Budgeting / Governance & Compliance etc.

B.E. / B.Tech in Chemical / Mechanical / Polymer / Petrochemical / Plastics Engineering / Plastics Technology with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) OR PhD / M.Sc in Applied Polymer Science / Polymer Science with minimum 60% (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) OR MBA / PGDM with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
Minimum 21 years’ post-qualification work experience in marketing, with at least 10 years in Sales / Marketing / Branding in the petrochemical / polymer industry.

Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science / Polymer Engineering / Materials Science / Materials Engineering / Petrochemical Engineering / Plastics Engineering / Plastics Technology with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) OR PhD / M.Sc in Applied Polymer Science / Polymer Science with minimum 60% (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).
Minimum 4 years of experience in polymer processing / application development / technical service within the polymer industry.

Full-time Masters / Post Graduate Diploma in Business Administration / Hospitality Management / Retail Management / Marketing Management / Operations Management / Hotel Management with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).

Minimum 10 years of relevant post-qualification experience, of which at least 5 years in retail operations and/or hospitality/hotel management and/or business strategy and/or marketing and/or revenue management in Convenience Retail / QSR / F&B Chains / Hospitality / Mall facility / Airport or Railway retail or F&B operations; with at least 2 years in a team leadership role covering multi-store / multi-location / multi-facility managing complete P&L.

B.E. / B.Tech with minimum 60% aggregate AND Masters / PG Diploma in Hospitality with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD) OR Graduation (other than B.E./B.Tech) with Masters / PG Diploma in Business Administration / Hospitality with minimum 60% aggregate (relaxed to 50% for SC/ST/PwBD).

Minimum 5 years of relevant post-qualification experience, of which at least 3 years in Facility Management / QSR / Food & Beverage Chains / Retail Store Operations / Hospitality Management / Hotel Management / Mall facility management.

salary_details.pay_scale: E2 to E8 (Rs. 50,000–1,60,000 to Rs. 1,20,000–2,80,000) as per DPE guidelines; Approx. CTC Rs. 21.07 Lakhs to Rs. 55.49 Lakhs per annum at minimum of respective pay scale
salary_details.details: Selected candidates will be placed in appropriate grades (E2 to E8) and pay points based on profile, qualification, experience, and performance in selection. CTC indicated is at the minimum of the pay scale for metro city postings. | CTC includes Basic Pay, Dearness Allowance (IDA pattern), HRA, Perks & Allowances, Retirement Benefits (DPE guidelines), and Performance-Related Pay. Additional benefits include medical coverage for self and dependants, annual leave entitlements, housing loan, education loan, furniture-on-hire, conveyance allowance, and communication expenses.

selection_process: Part I General Aptitude Verbal Ability, Quantitative Aptitude and Logical Reasoning
Part II Professional Knowledge Questions related to the area of specialization of the applied profile
The multi-stage selection process will be adopted based on the number of applications received for each profile. Final selection is subject to document verification
Applications will be screened on the basis of years of relevant work experience
and other eligibility criteria as specified for each profile.
Stage 3 – Case Based Discussion / Group Task / Personal Interview

Candidates shortlisted in the CBT (category-wise and discipline-wise merit list) will be called for Case Based Discussion and/or Group Task and/or Personal Interview. Document verification shall be conducted before this stage. Provisional selection will be based on relevant work experience
and overall performance across all selection stages.

Provisionally selected candidates must clear a Pre-Employment Medical Examination conducted by BPCL’s authorized doctor / nominated hospital as per OISD-GDN-166 guidelines. Medical fitness decision shall be final and binding. Reference for medical examination does not mean final selection.

physical_eligibility.details: Bharat Petroleum Corporation Limited (BPCL), a Fortune Global 500 and Maharatna company, has officially released its advertisement dated 31/05/2026 for recruitment of Experienced Professionals across five verticals: Bharat Petro Resources Ltd (BPRL), Company Secretary, Finance, Petrochemicals, and Wayside Amenities. The notification includes complete details on post-wise vacancies, eligibility, selection methodology, pay scales, reservation policy, application process, and general instructions. Candidates are strongly advised to read the full notification before applying. The notification is available on the official BPCL website. | Download BPCL Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026 Official Notification PDF

how_to_apply: Candidates shall apply online only; no other mode of application will be accepted. Candidates must read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying. All details entered in the online form will be treated as final and no changes will be entertained after submission.
Documents Required to be Scanned and Uploaded (PDF format):
Date of Birth Proof (Class 10th / DOB Certificate)
Educational Qualification Proof - Consolidated Marksheet AND Degree / Diploma Certificate (both mandatory)

Service Certificate / Work-Experience Certificate(s) from each organization on their letterhead, signed/stamped by authorized representative, showing: Name, Designation, Length of Service, Date of Joining, Date of Separation (if applicable), Nature of Employment (Full-time / Part-time), Detailed Nature of Work, and Current Basic Salary and CTC
Relevant Category / Caste Certificate (SC / ST / OBC-NCL / EWS / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen) - issued for appointments under Government of India
Recent Color Passport Size Photograph (not older than April 2026)
Scanned copy of Signature (signature in CAPITAL LETTERS will NOT be accepted)
Latest three salary slips from current organization (scanned together in a single PDF file)
Additional Documents to be Produced at the time of Selection Process / Document Verification:
Call Letter / Admit Card along with a valid photo identity proof in original and self-attested photocopy
Caste Certificate in prescribed Government of India format (for SC/ST candidates)
OBC (Non-Creamy Layer) Certificate in prescribed Government of India format (for OBC-NCL candidates); self-undertaking to be submitted at time of Personal Interview
Income and Asset Certificate issued by Competent Authority valid for FY 2026-27 (for EWS candidates); must be submitted at the time of interview
Disability Certificate issued by a Competent Authority as per RPwBD Act, 2016 (for PwBD candidates)
Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from employer - mandatory for candidates presently employed in Central/State Government, Autonomous bodies, and PSUs
Apply Online at: www.bharatpetroleum.in → CAREERS → CURRENT JOB OPENING → APPLY ONLINE
For queries: Email - [email protected] (mention Application ID in the subject line). Candidates are NOT required to send printout of application or any other documents in hard copy to BPCL.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All eligibility criteria - age, qualification, and experience - are reckoned as on 01-04-2026. Candidates can apply for only one profile. Candidates are advised to submit only one application; in case of multiple applications, only the latest one shall be considered as final. Percentage of marks is calculated on the basis of total marks obtained in all semesters/years in all subjects. Rounding off of percentage is not allowed. Experience gained only after the date of declaration of result of the qualifying degree will be considered. Short-term trainee experience (summer/winter internships during degree) will not be counted. All qualifications must be from AICTE approved / UGC recognized University / Deemed University. Equivalent percentage for CGPA/OGPA must be indicated and supported by a certificate from the University. OBC candidates belonging to ‘Creamy Layer’ are not entitled for OBC-NCL reservation; they must apply as General. OBC-NCL certificate should clearly indicate non-creamy layer status. Candidates presently employed in Central / State Government, Autonomous bodies, PSUs must produce a No Objection Certificate (NOC) from their employer at the time of selection process. All future communications will be through e-mail only. The email ID and mobile number must remain valid for at least one year. BPCL will not be responsible for non-delivery due to invalid email ID. No email confirmation will be sent on successful registration or fee payment. Candidates must take a printout of the payment acknowledgment for future reference. 3rd AC train fare reimbursement is admissible for CBT for outstation SC, ST & PwBD candidates. 2nd AC train fare is admissible for all outstation candidates appearing in the Interview (distance of not less than 30 km). This is not applicable for candidates already in Central / State Government Services / PSUs. Corrigendum / Addendum, if any, will be published on the official BPCL website only - https://www.bharatpetroleum.in/ - candidates must check regularly. BPCL reserves the right to cancel / restrict / enlarge / modify / alter the recruitment process at any stage without notice. Canvassing in any form at any stage will lead to cancellation of candidature. Court of jurisdiction for any dispute will be at Mumbai. All applications are accepted through the online portal only. This activity has NOT been outsourced by BPCL to any agency/individual. Applicants are advised to beware of fraudulent agencies/individuals.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BPCL Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 June 2026 (23:59 hours). Apply only via the official BPCL careers portal.

faq.question: Q2. Where can I download the official BPCL notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF is available on BPCL’s website: https://www.bharatpetroleum.in/images/files/bpcl-mid-senior-level-advertisement-may26.pdf

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available and which verticals are covered?
faq.answer: A total of 55 vacancies (indicative) across five verticals: Bharat Petro Resources Ltd (BPRL), Company Secretary, Finance, Petrochemicals, and Wayside Amenities (WSA). Vacancies may change at BPCL’s discretion.

faq.question: Q4. Who is eligible to apply (nationality, qualifications, experience)?
faq.answer: Only Indian nationals. Candidates must have essential qualifications from AICTE/UGC-recognized institutions and the required post-qualification work experience for the chosen profile, all reckoned as on 01-04-2026. Refer to the post-wise eligibility in the PDF for details.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: Multi-stage process: Application screening → Computer Based Test (CBT) → Case-based discussion / Group task / Personal Interview → Pre-Employment Medical Examination. Shortlisting and stages depend on applications received.

faq.question: Q6. What are the application fees and payment modes?
faq.answer: General / OBC-NCL / EWS / Ex-Servicemen: Rs. 1,180 (incl. GST); SC / ST / PwBD: Nil. Payment is online only via debit/credit card, UPI or net banking. Fees are non-refundable.

faq.question: Q7. Can I apply for more than one profile?
faq.answer: No. Candidates may apply for only one profile. If multiple applications are submitted, the latest application will be considered final.

faq.question: Q8. What documents must be scanned and uploaded while applying?
faq.answer: Mandatory uploads (PDF): DOB proof (10th certificate), consolidated marksheet and degree certificate, work-experience certificates, recent colour passport photo (not older than Apr 2026), scanned signature, latest three salary slips, and category certificate (if applicable). See notification for full list and specifications.

faq.question: Q9. How are age and relaxations calculated?
faq.answer: Age limits vary by post and are reckoned as on 01-04-2026. Relaxations: SC/ST +5 years, OBC-NCL +3 years, PwBD +10 years, Ex-Servicemen +5 years (conditions apply). A cumulative relaxation cap of 10 years or absolute cap (55 years) applies as per post; check post-wise age limits in the notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where do I apply and whom do I contact for queries?
faq.answer: Apply online at BPCL Careers: https://www.bharatpetroleum.in/careers or the direct application portal: https://ibpsreg.ibps.in/bpcllmsmay26/ For queries email [email protected] (mention your Application ID).

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for BPCL Experienced Professionals Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 20 June 2026 (23:59 hours). Apply only via the official BPCL careers portal.
